controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed upon implementation of the resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed on filing of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolv
controls.control_description:
<image>
(3) where resolution is pursued under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code,
2016 - half of the additional provisions made may be reversed on filing
of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be
reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolvency resolution
process under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed on filing of insolvency application and the remaining additional provisions may be reversed upon admission of the borrower into the insolv

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed upon completion of the assignment of debt / recovery
controls.control_description:
or,
(4) where assignment of debt / recovery proceedings is initiated - the
additional provisions may be reversed upon completion of the
assignment of debt / recovery.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed upon completion of the assignment of debt / recovery

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
The provisions of this Chapter shall be applicable to all restructurings, including
those undertaken under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all restructurings, including those undertaken under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i
controls.control_description:
An account classified as 'standard' shall be immediately downgraded as non-
performing assets, i.e., 'sub-standard' to begin with, following a restructuring by
a NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately downgraded as non- performing assets, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring
controls.control_description:
An account classified as non-performing asset, upon restructuring by a NBFC,
shall continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to have the same asset classification as prior to restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial
controls.control_description:
In both above cases, the asset classification shall continue to be governed by
the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income
Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the ageing criteria as per extant asset classification norms contained in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated by a nbfc as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan
controls.control_description:
Any additional finance approved under the resolution plan (including any
resolution plan approved by the Adjudicating Authority under Insolvency and
Bankruptcy Code, 2016) may be treated by a NBFC as standard asset during the
monitoring period under the approved resolution plan, provided the account
demonstrates satisfactory performance during the monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated by a nbfc as standard asset during the monitoring period under the approved resolution plan

controls.control_objective: To ensure be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by a nbfc
controls.control_description:
If the restructured asset fails to perform satisfactorily during the monitoring period
or does not qualify for upgradation at the end of the monitoring period, the
additional finance shall be placed in the same asset classification category as the
restructured debt by a NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be placed in the same asset classification category as the restructured debt by a nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
Any interim finance [as defined in section 5 (15) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy
Code, 2016] extended by the specified lenders to borrowers undergoing
insolvency proceedings under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 may
be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as
defined in the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as standard asset during the insolvency resolution process period as defined in the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci
controls.control_description:
Standard accounts classified as non-performing and non-performing accounts
retained in the same category on restructuring by a NBFC may be upgraded only
when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate
'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the specified lenders during the
monitoring period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be upgraded only when all the outstanding loan / credit facilities in the account demonstrate 'satisfactory performance' with respect to all the speci

controls.control_objective: To ensure the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit
controls.control_description:
Provided that the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the
commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on
the credit facility with longest period of moratorium under the terms of RP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the account cannot be upgraded before one year from the commencement of the first payment of interest or principal (whichever is later) on the credit

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o
controls.control_description:
In addition to the requirement in paragraph 59, for accounts where the aggregate
exposure of specified lenders is ₹100 crore and above at the time of
implementation of resolution plan, to qualify for an upgrade, in addition to
demonstration of satisfactory performance, the credit facilities of the borrower
shall also be rated as investment grade (BBB- or better), at the time of upgrade,
by credit rating agencies accredited by the Reserve Bank for the purpose of bank
loan ratings.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be rated as investment grade (bbb- or better), at the time of upgrade, by credit rating agencies accredited by the reserve bank for the purpose o

controls.control_objective: To ensure require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating
controls.control_description:
Provided that while accounts with aggregate exposure of ₹500 crore and above
shall require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require two ratings, those below ₹500 crore shall require one rating

controls.control_objective: To ensure be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade
controls.control_description:
Provided further that if the ratings are obtained from more than the required
number of credit rating agencies, all such ratings shall be investment grade for
the account to qualify for an upgrade.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be investment grade for the account to qualify for an upgrade

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 36
controls.control_description:
Explanation: These ratings referred to in the second proviso shall be the normal
ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not Independent Credit
Evaluation specified in paragraph 36.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the normal ratings provided by the credit rating agencies and not independent credit evaluation specified in paragraph 36

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016
controls.control_description:
If a borrower fails to demonstrate satisfactory performance with respect to all the
specified lenders during the monitoring period, asset classification upgrade shall
be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under
these Directions or under the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to implementation of a fresh restructuring / change in ownership under these directions or under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recog
controls.control_description:
An account that has been restructured shall attract provisioning as per the asset
classification category as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract provisioning as per the asset classification category as laid out in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recog

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraphs 61 and 62 at the end of the review period
controls.control_description:
A NBFC shall make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account
referred to in paragraphs 61 and 62 at the end of the Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional specific provision of 15 per cent for an account referred to in paragraphs 61 and 62 at the end of the review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category
controls.control_description:
Specific provisions held on restructured assets by a NBFC as per paragraph 64
above, may be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed when the accounts are upgraded to standard category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 51 by a nbfc
controls.control_description:
Additional specific provisions as required under paragraph 64, along with other
additional specific provisions, may be reversed as per the norms laid down in
paragraph 51 by a NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed as per the norms laid down in paragraph 51 by a nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
During the insolvency resolution process period, provisioning for the interim
finance shall be governed by the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning)
Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 56 and 57
controls.control_description:
Subsequently, upon approval of the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority,
treatment of such interim finance shall be as per the norms applicable to
additional finance, as per paragraphs 56 and 57.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the norms applicable to additional finance, as per paragraphs 56 and 57

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to 90
controls.control_description:
In respect of accounts of borrowers where a final resolution plan, as approved by
the Committee of Creditors, has been submitted by the Resolution Professional
for approval of the Adjudicating Authority (in terms of section 30(6) of the
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016), a NBFC may keep the provisions held
as on the date of such submission of RP frozen for a period of six months from
the date of submission of the plan or up to 90 days from the date of approval of
<image>
the resolution plan by the Adjudicating Authority in terms of section 31 (1) of the
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, whichever is earlier.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the provisions held as on the date of such submission of rp frozen for a period of six months from the date of submission of the plan or up to 90

controls.control_objective: To ensure make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall
controls.control_description:
Provided that in cases where the provisioning held is lower than the expected
required provisioning, a NBFC shall make additional provisioning to the extent of
the shortfall.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make additional provisioning to the extent of the shortfall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be available only in cases where the provisioning held by a nbfc as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority i
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing the quantum of the provision as per paragraph 69 shall be
available only in cases where the provisioning held by a NBFC as on the date of
submission of the plan for approval of the Adjudicating Authority is more than the
expected provisioning required to be held in the normal course upon
implementation of the approved resolution plan, taking into account the contours
of the resolution plan approved by Committee of Creditors / Adjudicating
Authority, as the case may be, and extant prudential norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be available only in cases where the provisioning held by a nbfc as on the date of submission of the plan for approval of the adjudicating authority i

controls.control_objective: To ensure reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 70 , a NBFC shall not reverse the excess provisions
held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the
Adjudicating Authority at this stage.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reverse the excess provisions held as on the date of submission of the resolution plan for approval of the adjudicating authority at this stage

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning)
controls.control_description:
Subsequent to the lapse of the period specified in paragraph 70, provisioning
shall be as per the requirements in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the requirements in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - income recognition, asset classification and provisioning)

controls.control_objective: To ensure lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall
controls.control_description:
The facility of freezing of provisions as allowed in paragraph 70 shall lapse
immediately if the Adjudicating Authority rejects the resolution plan thus
submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall continue be
governed by the extant asset classification norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lapse immediately if the adjudicating authority rejects the resolution plan thus submitted, and asset classification in respect of such borrower shall

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on cash basis
controls.control_description:
Interest income in respect of restructured accounts classified as 'standard assets'
may be recognized on accrual basis and that in respect of the restructured
accounts classified as 'non-performing assets' shall be recognised on cash basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised <image> only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership
controls.control_description:
In the case of additional finance in accounts where the pre-restructuring facilities
were classified as non-performing assets, the interest income shall be recognised
<image>
only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in
ownership.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised <image> only on cash basis except when the restructuring is accompanied by a change in ownership

controls.control_objective: To ensure be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a nbfc after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 or
controls.control_description:
In case of change in ownership of the borrowing entity, credit facilities of the
concerned borrowing entities may be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a
NBFC after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the Insolvency
and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 or under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be continued / upgraded as 'standard' by a nbfc after the change in ownership is implemented, either under the insolvency and bankruptcy code, 2016 or

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) the nbfc shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n
controls.control_description:
If the change in ownership is implemented under these Directions, then the
classification as 'standard' shall be subject to the following conditions:
(1) The NBFC shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and
clearly establish that the acquirer is not a person disqualified in terms of
Section 29A of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following conditions: (1) the nbfc shall conduct necessary due diligence in this regard and clearly establish that the acquirer is n

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc
controls.control_description:
(2) The NBFC shall clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person
/ entity / subsidiary / associate etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly establish that the 'new promoter' is not a person / entity / subsidiary / associate etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest share
controls.control_description:
(3) The new promoter shall have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up
equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be
the single largest shareholder of the borrower entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have acquired at least 26 per cent of the paid-up equity capital as well as voting rights of the borrower entity and shall be the single largest share

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan
controls.control_description:
(4) The new promoter shall be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the
definition of 'control' in the Companies Act, 2013 / regulations issued by
the Securities and Exchange Board of India / any other applicable
regulations / accounting standards, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in 'control' of the borrower entity as per the definition of 'control' in the companies act, 2013 / regulations issued by the securities and exchan

controls.control_objective: To ensure trigger a fresh review period
controls.control_description:
If the account fails to perform satisfactorily at any point of time during the
monitoring period, it shall trigger a fresh Review Period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to trigger a fresh review period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same
controls.control_description:
The quantum of provisions held (excluding additional provisions) by the NBFC
against the said account as on the date of change in ownership of the borrowing
entities may be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to
satisfactory performance during the same.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reversed only after the end of monitoring period subject to satisfactory performance during the same

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the nbfc for the remaining lock-in period
controls.control_description:
In case the promoters' shares have been pledged with a NBFC as collateral
during the lock-in period mandated under Securities and Exchange Board of India
(Issue of Capital and Disclosure Requirements) (ICDR) Regulations, 2018, and
the pledge is invoked during the lock-in period by the NBFC consequent to default
by the company, such shares may be transferred to the NBFC but shall continue
to be under lock-in in the hands of the NBFC for the remaining lock-in period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be under lock-in in the hands of the nbfc for the remaining lock-in period

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a nbfc with regard to the residual de
controls.control_description:
A sale and leaseback transaction of the assets of a borrower or other transactions
of similar nature shall be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of
asset classification and provisioning in the books of a NBFC with regard to the
residual debt of the seller as well as the debt of the buyer if all the following
conditions are met:
(1) the seller of the assets is in financial difficulty;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as an event of restructuring for the purpose of asset classification and provisioning in the books of a nbfc with regard to the residual de

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain ineligible for restructuring
controls.control_description:
Borrowers who have committed frauds/ malfeasance/ wilful default as well as any
entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall remain ineligible for
restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain ineligible for restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro
controls.control_description:
However, in cases where the existing promoters are replaced by new promoters
satisfying the conditions specified at sub-paragraphs 77(1) to 77(4)_bookmark20,
and the borrower company is totally delinked from such erstwhile promoters /
management, a NBFC may take a view on restructuring such accounts based on
their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the
erstwhile promoters / management.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take a view on restructuring such accounts based on their viability, without prejudice to the continuance of criminal action against the erstwhile pro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters
controls.control_description:
A wilful defaulter or any entity with which a wilful defaulter is associated shall be
eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter
from the List of Wilful Defaulters, subject to penal measures applicable to
borrowers classified as wilful defaulter in terms of the Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large
Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for restructuring subsequent to removal of the name of wilful defaulter from the list of wilful defaulters

controls.control_objective: To ensure be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the nbfc
controls.control_description:
The objective of compromise settlements shall be to maximise the possible
recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of
the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be to maximise the possible recovery from a distressed borrower at minimum expense, in the best interest of the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a nbfc and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the nbfc
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements and technical write-offs shall be without prejudice
to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a NBFC and a borrower
relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the NBFC, subject to such
claims not being recognised in any manner on the balance sheet of the NBFC at
the time of the settlement or subsequently till actual realization of such
receivables.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to any mutually agreed contractual provisions between a nbfc and a borrower relating to future contingent realizations or recovery by the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Provided that any such claims recognised on the balance sheet of the NBFC shall
render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to render the arrangement to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as restructuring
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding paragraph 88, compromise settlements where the time for
payment of the agreed settlement amount exceeds three months shall be treated
as restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as restructuring

controls.control_objective: To ensure also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto
controls.control_description:
Any arrangement involving part settlement with the borrower shall also fall under
the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable
thereto.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also fall under the definition of restructuring and shall be governed by the provisions applicable thereto

controls.control_objective: To ensure undermined in any manner
controls.control_description:
However, such technical write-offs do not entail any waiver of claims against the
borrower and thus the NBFC's right to recovery shall not undermined in any
manner.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undermined in any manner

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with reference to the original exposure
controls.control_description:
In case of partial technical write-offs, the prudential requirements in respect of
residual exposure, including provisioning and asset classification, shall be with
reference to the original exposure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with reference to the original exposure

controls.control_objective: To ensure meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset
controls.control_description:
<image>
Provided that the amount of provision including the amount representing partial
technical write-off shall meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed
on the gross value of the asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meet the extant provisioning requirements, as computed on the gross value of the asset

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
controls.control_description:
There shall be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a
quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs
approved by a particular authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a reporting mechanism to the next higher authority, at least on a quarterly basis, with respect to compromise settlements and technical write offs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the board
controls.control_description:
Provided that compromise settlements and technical write-offs approved by the
MD & CEO / Board Level Committee shall be reported to the Board.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported to the board

controls.control_objective: To ensure mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo
controls.control_description:
The Board shall mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate
coverage of the following aspects at the minimum:
(1) trend in number of accounts and amounts subjected to compromise
settlement and/or technical write-off (q-o-q and y-o-y);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mandate a suitable reporting format so as to ensure adequate coverage of the following aspects at the minimum: (1) trend in number of accounts and amo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the nbfc can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers
controls.control_description:
In respect of borrowers subject to compromise settlements, there shall be a
cooling period as determined by the respective Board approved policies before
the NBFC can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a cooling period as determined by the respective board approved policies before the nbfc can assume fresh exposures to such borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to a floor of 12 months with a nbfc being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies
controls.control_description:
Provided that the cooling period in respect of exposures shall be subject to a floor
of 12 months with a NBFC being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms
of their Board approved policies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to a floor of 12 months with a nbfc being free to stipulate higher cooling periods in terms of their board approved policies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the board approved policies of a nbfc
controls.control_description:
The cooling period to be adopted in respect of exposures subjected to technical
write-offs shall be as per the Board approved policies of a NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the board approved policies of a nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri
controls.control_description:
A NBFC may undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect
of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the
criminal proceeding underway against such borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake compromise settlements or technical write-offs in respect of accounts categorised as wilful defaulters or fraud without prejudice to the cri

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable in cases where a nbfc enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs
controls.control_description:
The penal measures applicable to borrowers classified as fraud or wilful defaulter
in terms of the Reserve Bank of India (Fraud Risk Management in NBFCs)
Directions, 2024 and the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions,
2025, respectively, shall continue to be applicable in cases where a NBFC enter
into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods
specified in paragraphs 95 and 96, in respect of such borrowers, shall be without
prejudice to such penal measures.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be applicable in cases where a nbfc enter into compromise settlement with such borrowers, and the cooling periods specified in paragraphs

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a preferred option
controls.control_description:
As long as larger policy concerns are
suitably addressed and the costs of malafide actions are made to be borne by
the perpetrators, early recoveries by a NBFC should be a preferred option,
subject to safeguards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a preferred option

controls.control_objective: To ensure be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force
controls.control_description:
The compromise settlements with the borrowers under these Directions shall be
without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be without prejudice to the provisions of any other statute in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities
controls.control_description:
Wherever a NBFC had commenced recovery proceedings under a judicial forum
and the same is pending before such judicial forum, any settlement arrived at with
the borrower shall be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned
judicial authorities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to obtaining a consent decree from the concerned judicial authorities

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to projects where financial closure has been achieved as on october 1, 2025, for which the prudential guidelines on project finance prevailing b
controls.control_description:
The instructions contained in paragraphs 104 to 122 shall not apply to projects
where financial closure has been achieved as on October 1, 2025, for which the
prudential guidelines on project finance prevailing before October 1, 2025, which
otherwise shall be treated as repealed, shall apply.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be computed as the present value of cash flows representing the interest at the rate charged on the advance on restructuring and the principal, discou
controls.control_description:
Fair value of the loan after restructuring shall be computed as the present value
of cash flows representing the interest at the rate charged on the advance on
restructuring and the principal, discounted at a rate equal to the NBFC's bare
lending rate as applicable to the borrower as on the date of restructuring.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be computed as the present value of cash flows representing the interest at the rate charged on the advance on restructuring and the principal, discou

controls.control_objective: To ensure have to be followed consistently by nbfcs in future
controls.control_description:
The
above formula moderates the swing in the diminution of present value of loans
with the interest rate cycle and shall have to be followed consistently by NBFCs
in future.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have to be followed consistently by nbfcs in future

controls.control_objective: To ensure substitute for each other
controls.control_description:
Thus,
the two types of the provisions shall not substitute for each other.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to substitute for each other

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held under 'current investments' and valued as per usual valuation norms
controls.control_description:
The amount of principal converted into debt / equity instruments on restructuring
shall be held under 'current investments' and valued as per usual valuation
norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held under 'current investments' and valued as per usual valuation norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be npv of the above portion plus valuation loss on account of conversion into debt/equity instruments
controls.control_description:
The total sacrifice involved for the NBFC shall be NPV of the above portion plus
valuation loss on account of conversion into debt/equity instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be npv of the above portion plus valuation loss on account of conversion into debt/equity instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure correctly capture the diminution in fair value of restructured accounts as it shall have a bearing not only on the provisioning required to be made by
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall correctly capture the diminution in fair value of restructured accounts
as it shall have a bearing not only on the provisioning required to be made by
them but also on the amount of sacrifice required from the promoters.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to correctly capture the diminution in fair value of restructured accounts as it shall have a bearing not only on the provisioning required to be made by

controls.control_objective: To ensure be any effort on the part of nbfcs to artificially reduce the net present value of cash flows by resorting to any sort of financial engineering
controls.control_description:
Further,
there must not be any effort on the part of NBFCs to artificially reduce the net
present value of cash flows by resorting to any sort of financial engineering.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be any effort on the part of nbfcs to artificially reduce the net present value of cash flows by resorting to any sort of financial engineering

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a proper mechanism of checks and balances to ensure accurate calculation of erosion in the fair value of restructured accounts
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall put in place a proper mechanism of checks and balances to ensure
accurate calculation of erosion in the fair value of restructured accounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a proper mechanism of checks and balances to ensure accurate calculation of erosion in the fair value of restructured accounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at ₹1/- till maturity of the security
controls.control_description:
In the event any security is taken in lieu of the diminution in the fair value of the
advance, it shall be valued at ₹1/- till maturity of the security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at ₹1/- till maturity of the security

controls.control_objective: To ensure be re-computed on each balance sheet date till satisfactory completion of all repayment obligations and full repayment of the outstanding in the accou
controls.control_description:
The diminution in the fair value shall be re-computed on each balance sheet date
till satisfactory completion of all repayment obligations and full repayment of the
outstanding in the account, to capture the changes in the fair value on account of
changes in the bare lending rate as applicable to the borrower.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be re-computed on each balance sheet date till satisfactory completion of all repayment obligations and full repayment of the outstanding in the accou

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide for the shortfall in provision or reverse the amount of excess provision held in the distinct account
controls.control_description:
Consequently, a
NBFC shall provide for the shortfall in provision or reverse the amount of excess
provision held in the distinct account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide for the shortfall in provision or reverse the amount of excess provision held in the distinct account

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the option of notionally computing the amount of diminution in the fair value and providing therefor, at five percent of the total exposure, in r
controls.control_description:
If due to lack of expertise / appropriate infrastructure, a NBFC finds it difficult to
ensure computation of diminution in the fair value of advances, as an alternative
to the methodology prescribed above for computing the amount of diminution in
the fair value, a NBFC shall have the option of notionally computing the amount
of diminution in the fair value and providing therefor, at five percent of the total
exposure, in respect of all restructured accounts where the total dues to NBFC(s)
are less than ₹1 crore.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the option of notionally computing the amount of diminution in the fair value and providing therefor, at five percent of the total exposure, in r

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured advance has been classified
controls.control_description:
The debt/equity instruments so created shall
be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured
advance has been classified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured advance has been classified

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the restructured advance
controls.control_description:
Further movement in the asset classification of these instruments shall also be
determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the restructured
advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the restructured advance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
In the case of restructured accounts classified as 'standard', the income, if any,
generated by these instruments shall be recognised on accrual basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised only on cash basis
controls.control_description:
In the case of restructured accounts classified as non-performing assets, the
income, if any, generated by these instruments shall be recognised only on cash
basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised only on cash basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be held under 'current investments' and valued as per usual valuation norms
controls.control_description:
These instruments shall be held under 'current investments' and valued as per
usual valuation norms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be held under 'current investments' and valued as per usual valuation norms

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued either at market value
controls.control_description:
Equity classified as standard asset shall be valued either at market value, if
quoted, or at break-up value, if not quoted (without considering the revaluation
reserve, if any) which is to be ascertained from the company's latest balance
sheet.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued either at market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be valued at market value
controls.control_description:
Equity instrument classified as NPA shall be valued at market value, if quoted,
and in case where equity is not quoted, it shall be valued at ₹1
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be valued at market value

controls.control_objective: To ensure be offset against the appreciation in any other securities held under the 'current investment' category
controls.control_description:
Depreciation on these instruments shall not be offset against the appreciation in
any other securities held under the 'current investment' category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be offset against the appreciation in any other securities held under the 'current investment' category

controls.control_objective: To ensure be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured advance has been classified
controls.control_description:
The FITL/debt or equity instrument created by conversion of unpaid interest shall
be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured
advance has been classified.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be classified in the same asset classification category in which the restructured advance has been classified

controls.control_objective: To ensure be determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the restructured advance
controls.control_description:
Further movement in the asset classification of FITL / debt or equity instruments
shall be determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the
restructured advance.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be determined based on the subsequent asset classification of the restructured advance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised on accrual basis
controls.control_description:
The income, if any, generated by these instruments shall be recognised on
accrual basis, if these instruments are classified as 'standard', and on cash basis
in the cases where these have been classified as a non-performing asset.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised on accrual basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalisation)'
controls.control_description:
The unrealised income represented by FITL / Debt or equity instrument shall have
a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'Sundry Liabilities Account
(Interest Capitalisation)'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have a corresponding credit in an account styled as 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalisation)'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be recognised in the profit and loss account, while simultaneously reducing the balance in the 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalisation)'
controls.control_description:
Only on repayment in case of FITL or sale / redemption proceeds of the debt /
equity instruments, the amount received shall be recognised in the Profit and
Loss Account, while simultaneously reducing the balance in the 'Sundry Liabilities
Account (Interest Capitalisation)'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be recognised in the profit and loss account, while simultaneously reducing the balance in the 'sundry liabilities account (interest capitalisation)'

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per paragraphs 216 to 219
controls.control_description: Valuation and provisioning norms shall be as per paragraphs 216 to 219.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per paragraphs 216 to 219

controls.control_objective: To ensure be charged to the sundry liabilities (interest capitalisation) account
controls.control_description:
The depreciation, if any, on valuation shall be charged to the Sundry Liabilities
(Interest Capitalisation) Account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be charged to the sundry liabilities (interest capitalisation) account

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202
controls.control_description:
To mitigate the burden of debt servicing brought about by trade disruptions
caused by global headwinds and to ensure the continuity of viable businesses, a
NBFC may extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under
Reserve Bank of India (Trade Relief Measures) Directions, 2025 dated November
14, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend relief measures to eligible borrowers, as specified under reserve bank of india (trade relief measures) directions, 2025 dated november 14, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The
directions, instructions and guidelines already repealed vide any of the directions,
instructions, and guidelines listed in the above notification shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken,
or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall
continue to be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or
acknowledgments granted under these repealed lists shall be deemed as
governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may
be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or
punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or
guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank shall
be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure to sacrifice / waive
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of the Model Operating Procedure (MOP), Debt Relief Schemes
(DRS) refer to Schemes notified by the State Governments that entail funding by the
fiscal authorities to cover debt obligations of a targeted segment of borrowers that the
regulated entities are required to sacrifice / waive.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to sacrifice / waive

controls.control_objective: To ensure include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support
controls.control_description:
Announcement / notification of any such DRS should include the specific stress or
distress situation necessitating announcement of such support.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include the specific stress or distress situation necessitating announcement of such support

controls.control_objective: To ensure be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed
controls.control_description:
Given the broader
implications of such DRS for the credit culture, while broad based relief measures can
be addressed through pure fiscal support in the form of Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT),
DRS should be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to
alleviate financial stress have failed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be considered only as a measure of last resort when other measures to alleviate financial stress have failed

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali
controls.control_description:
Before announcing any DRS, Governments may engage with the State Level
Bankers' Committee (SLBC)/ District level Consultative Committee (DCC) to evolve a
coordinated action plan for conceptualisation, design, and implementation of the DRS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage with the state level bankers' committee (slbc)/ district level consultative committee (dcc) to evolve a coordinated action plan for conceptuali

controls.control_objective: To ensure , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning
controls.control_description:
The schemes should, cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of
borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues
concerning settlement of dues by Government to the lending institutions, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , cover critical aspects of the scheme like identification of borrowers, impact assessment, implementation timelines, resolution of issues concerning

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments
controls.control_description:
The design features should ensure that the DRS do not impact the financial stability
aspects of the region / State or create moral hazards in the borrower segments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the drs do not impact the financial stability aspects of the region / state or create moral hazards in the borrower segments

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be taken into account
controls.control_description: should also be taken into account.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be taken into account

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts
controls.control_description:
Detailed budgetary provisions / funding may be provided upfront towards any
proposed DRS to fully cover the required settlement amounts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided upfront towards any proposed drs to fully cover the required settlement amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis
controls.control_description:
Where regulated entities
have dues from the Government, pertaining to earlier DRS schemes, new schemes
should be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be announced only on a fully pre-funded basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments
controls.control_description:
The DRS should be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain
any restrictive covenant against timely repayments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be targeted only at the impacted borrowers and should not contain any restrictive covenant against timely repayments

controls.control_objective: To ensure specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date
controls.control_description:
Further, it should specify the
criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of
critical / material events, including cut-off dates for filing/ submission,
acknowledgement, approval and settlement of claims along with compensation
clauses for delays in settling the funds, on part of the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to specify the criteria for determining eligible borrowers on an objective basis, detailed timeline of critical / material events, including cut-off date

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th
controls.control_description:
The DRS should cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered,
including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by the
regulated entities from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the entire outstanding dues of the borrowers being covered, including principal and accumulated interest till the date of receipt of funds by th

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated
entity against the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the creation of a receivable in the books of the regulated entity against the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government
controls.control_description:
The exposure of regulated entities to the borrower shall
continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue and shall be reduced to the extent of funds received from the government

controls.control_objective: To ensure generally be completed within 45 to 60 days
controls.control_description:
The entire implementation of the Scheme and settlement of claims by the
Governments to the regulated entities, should generally be completed within 45 to 60
days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to generally be completed within 45 to 60 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by rbi / nabard
controls.control_description:
The DRS should not contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction
issued by RBI / NABARD.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any provision contrary to any regulatory instruction issued by rbi / nabard

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain any provision that casts any obligations on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to: a
controls.control_description:
The design of the DRS should not contain any provision that casts any obligations
on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain any provision that casts any obligations on the regulated entities, directly or indirectly, to: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the applicable prudential guidelines
controls.control_description:
However, if the regulated entities agree to any of the above at the time of design of
DRS or subsequently, as per their Board-approved policies, it shall be subject to the
applicable prudential guidelines.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to the applicable prudential guidelines
